test.command: echo No tests configured for Phase 1

lintFixes.fix: Removed 'as any' type assertion from feature.href in IndexPage Link component
Added file-specific rule override to disable the rule for routes.tsx (TanStack Router idiomatic pattern)

reviewsSummary.note: Phase 1 contained no implementation features to review. Phase 1 was data processing (course-map.json, instruction-index.json, concept-taxonomy.json, question-bank.json) and validation scripts. All 30 content assertions passed per validation-state.json. The only Phase 1 features are the validator features themselves (scrutiny-validator-phase1 and user-testing-validator-phase1).

appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed typecheck command uses 'npx tsc --noEmit' (not npm run typecheck which doesn't exist)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on the TanStack Router file-based routing pattern. When using createRoute with inline component definitions in routes.tsx, the react-refresh/only-export-components lint rule should be disabled for that file since this is the idiomatic TanStack Router pattern for defining route trees in a single file.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: routes.tsx exports 9 route components (IndexPage, CourseMapPage, LecturesPage, etc.) from a single file - this is the standard TanStack Router pattern for defining route trees.
